title: Electricians
description: Install, maintain, and repair electrical wiring, equipment, and fixtures. Ensure that work is in accordance with relevant codes. May install or service street lights, intercom systems, or electrical control systems.

tasks.text: Prepare sketches or follow blueprints to determine the location of wiring or equipment and to ensure conformance to building and safety codes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Place conduit, pipes, or tubing, inside designated partitions, walls, or other concealed areas, and pull insulated wires or cables through the conduit to complete circuits between boxes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Work from ladders, scaffolds, or roofs to install, maintain, or repair electrical wiring, equipment, or fixtures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Use a variety of tools or equipment, such as power construction equipment, measuring devices, power tools, and testing equipment, such as oscilloscopes, ammeters, or test lamps.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble, install, test, or maintain electrical or electronic wiring, equipment, appliances, apparatus, or fixtures, using hand tools or power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Connect wires to circuit breakers, transformers, or other components.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain current electrician's license or identification card to meet governmental regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan layout and installation of electrical wiring, equipment, or fixtures, based on job specifications and local codes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or train workers to install, maintain, or repair electrical wiring, equipment, or fixtures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Test electrical systems or continuity of circuits in electrical wiring, equipment, or fixtures, using testing devices, such as ohmmeters, voltmeters, or oscilloscopes, to ensure compatibility and safety of system.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Diagnose malfunctioning systems, apparatus, or components, using test equipment and hand tools to locate the cause of a breakdown and correct the problem.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect electrical systems, equipment, or components to identify hazards, defects, or the need for adjustment or repair, and to ensure compliance with codes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Install ground leads and connect power cables to equipment, such as motors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise management on whether continued operation of equipment could be hazardous.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Repair or replace wiring, equipment, or fixtures, using hand tools or power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Construct or fabricate parts, using hand tools, according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide preliminary sketches or cost estimates for materials or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform business management duties, such as maintaining records or files, preparing reports, or ordering supplies or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Fasten small metal or plastic boxes to walls to house electrical switches or outlets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform physically demanding tasks, such as digging trenches to lay conduit or moving or lifting heavy objects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide assistance during emergencies by operating floodlights or generators, placing flares, or driving needed vehicles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
